message:
Update Homebrew formula with actual release artifact metadata

Transitions the Homebrew formula from placeholder/template values to actual
release artifact metadata for initial v0.1.0 publication. This prepares the
formula for tap distribution or core Homebrew submission.

Changes:
- Update URL from template org (coding-agent-search) to actual repository
  (Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search)
- Change target platform from macos-arm64 to linux-x86_64 to match the
  initial release target specified in Cargo.toml workspace metadata
- Replace placeholder SHA256 ("REPLACE_WITH_REAL_SHA256") with actual
  computed checksum: 58dd064f64d69ac1aec13ab504f1ba02e8f425b429d0e71900db75ea825e5715

Context:
The placeholder guard (verify_checksum_placeholder!) added in commit a781b9c
prevents accidental installation with dummy checksums. Now that we have a
real SHA256 from a test build, the formula can be tested end-to-end.

The linux-x86_64 target aligns with the workspace.metadata.dist configuration
set in the previous commit (a342835), which restricts initial releases to
Linux x86_64. Once the release pipeline is validated on this primary platform,
additional macOS and Windows targets can be added to both cargo-dist config
and the Homebrew formula (or platform-specific casks).

Note: The SHA256 value here is from a local test build. When cutting the
actual v0.1.0 release tag, the GitHub Actions workflow (.github/workflows/dist.yml)
will build official artifacts and generate .sha256 files. Those checksums must
be copied into this formula before publishing to a Homebrew tap.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,8 +2,8 @@ class CodingAgentSearch < Formula
   desc "Unified TUI search over local coding agent histories"
   homepage "https://github.com/coding-agent-search/coding-agent-search"
   version "0.1.0"
-  url "https://github.com/coding-agent-search/coding-agent-search/releases/download/v0.1.0/coding-agent-search-v0.1.0-macos-arm64.tar.gz"
-  sha256 "REPLACE_WITH_REAL_SHA256"
+  url "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search/releases/download/v0.1.0/coding-agent-search-v0.1.0-linux-x86_64.tar.gz"
+  sha256 "58dd064f64d69ac1aec13ab504f1ba02e8f425b429d0e71900db75ea825e5715"
   license "MIT"
 
   def verify_checksum_placeholder!
